# AUTOMATED QUANTUM DESIGN
Design tools for utility-scale quantum computation
[ ; ](https://1qbit.com/)
# REDEFINE INTRACTABLE
**Latest News:[1QBit has been invited to participate in DARPA’s QBI program, guiding quantum computing towards utility scale compute with our collaborators](https://1qbit.com/home/topqad-news/ "DARPA QBI Program")**
## Our History
[![Timeline of 1QBit's History](https://1qbit.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/1QBit_timeline-3.png)](https://1qbit.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/1QBit_timeline-3.png "Timeline of 1QBit's History")
The tools people use shape the way they view challenges.  
Revisiting old problems with an understanding of the next generation of computational tools enables the discovery of better solutions and uncovers entirely new opportunities.
